current.name: Lena Kovač
current.bio: 14 years in pastry. Trained at Le Cordon Bleu Paris. Lena tastes every batch before it ships — she has never approved a cookie she wouldn't feed to her own children.

current.name: Marcus Chen
current.bio: Former bread baker who switched to cookies and never looked back. Marcus manages the 48-hour cold fermentation schedule with the precision of a Swiss watchmaker.

current.name: Priya Sharma
current.bio: Priya develops every new flavor. She's tested over 200 chocolate sources and keeps a notebook of rejected combinations. The Raspberry Dark was her idea.

current.name: Diego Reyes
current.bio: The last pair of hands on every box. Diego inspects every cookie under a lamp, hand-stamps every box, and has been known to re-pack an order at 5pm because a corner looked off.

past.name: Yuki Tanaka
past.bio: Opened the kitchen with Lena in 2024. Developed the original Double Dark Chocolate recipe. Now runs her own patisserie in Tokyo.

past.name: Sam O'Brien
past.bio: Started as a dishwasher. Within 6 months was managing the morning bake. Left to study food science at Cornell.

past.name: Claire Dupont
past.bio: Designed the original hand-stamped kraft box. Now creative director at a sustainable packaging startup in Berlin.
